---
title: "Notes"
subtitle: "A wiki of deep-learning, reinforcement-learning, and the papers I read."
listing:
  contents: "**/*.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "title"
  categories: true
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: true
  fields: [title, description, categories]
---

Browse by area in the sidebar, or filter the full set below.
